original: You already own this decoration! Perhaps you can sell this copy instead...

This poster has been unlocked for decorating! You may hang it via the “Decorate” button in certain locations of your ship, such as your bed, the boarding ramp, the crew security console, or the navigation terminal.
A poster of a very fit bullstud hangs on the wall. He seems very proud of his muscular endowments - and some other kinds as well.
Paige is fond of whispering “[kiro.name]’s is bigger,” on her way by.
Paige seems more interested in the bullstud’s muscles than in his equipment. “I could do that if I wanted,” she says. “I just don’t wanna.”
